name: GPT Mini
description: Highlight text, right-click, and get quick AI answers from a free on-device model — no API key, no cloud.

action.default_title: GPT Mini — click to open the panel

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://huggingface.co https://*.huggingface.co https://*.hf.co data: blob:; worker-src 'self';
